description: 4-1 FAST8 vs standard economy floor difference: hp=44 (just above threshold 42), gold=32, 3 board units at level 6 (board.length=3 < level-1=5 → weakBoard via slot underfill). Both presets: mustStabilize=true (via weakBoard from board underfill). FAST8: economyFloor=24, rollBudget=8, count=3. Standard: economyFloor=30, rollBudget=2, count=1. FAST8 rolls MORE (count=3) than standard (count=1) due to lower economy floor (24 vs 30) when mustStabilize fires. Tests the compositional economy floor divergence between presets.
